rules: safety qualification never promotes design identity, design quality, applicability, or public claims
pending and superseded hard gates produce a proposal and can never be represented as a pass
authoritative passed and failed gates bind an evaluator plus an evidence fingerprint
design assessment is independent from hard safety qualification
reviewed generation trusts only MIR-owned mir-reviewed or protected-release promotion references
approval binds an exact candidate alternative design and qualification fingerprint
approved applicability requires exact mods plus a machine-readable structural envelope with positive and negative examples
quarantine and demotion never silently delete or rename a released technology
released identity changes require a TechnologyMigration record
the candidate and qualification catalog is context-owned and published as one exact canonical artifact
the schema-3 canonical catalog is finalized after sanitation and graph proof and has no mutation authority
GenerationPlan is a projection of deterministic TechnologyCatalog selection policy
every selectable alternative has an exact qualification and rejected alternatives cannot be selected
promotion admission requires a passing exact quality assessment, approval, applicability envelope, evidence, identity edge, and migration policy
offline governance records use canonical SHA-256 transport fingerprints
